sections.title: Talking to take the first trip

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. The name is Regulus Cento, one of the quetzal keepers for the Royal Family of Varlamore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Quetzal? What's a quetzal?

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Well just look here to my dear companion, Primio, and you'll have your answer. Varlamore is a large and diverse kingdom, but thanks to our quetzals, navigating it is as straightforward as can be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds exciting!

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: You're not wrong there. Nothing beats taking to the skies.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Speaking of which, Crown Prince Itzla Arkan has asked Primio and I to escort you to our capital city of Civitas illa Fortis, or Fortis as we prefer to call it. Is that something you'd be interested in?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Excellent! Now, I know Prince Itzla is very keen to meet with you once we reach the capital, so he's sending the Tullus twins to greet you on arrival. I'll be sure to point them out to you once we're there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: So, ready for your first journey to Varlamore?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's do it!

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Kuani! We will depart at once.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Well, here we are! Welcome to Fortis!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's beautiful!

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: I'm glad you think so! Now, I'm sure you're keen to get exploring, but Prince Itzla is very keen to meet with you first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mentioned he'd be sending some people to meet with me?

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Yes, the Tullus twins. That's them just to the west, by the stairs up to the palace. Why don't you head on over and introduce yourself?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There's something I need to do first.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Very well. I will wait for you here.

sections.title: Talking again before taking the first trip

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. Are you ready for your first journey to Varlamore?

sections.title: Talking after taking the first trip

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. Do you wish to travel to Fortis?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Then we will depart at once.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Very well.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. The name is Regulus Cento, one of the quetzal keepers for the Royal Family of Varlamore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Quetzal? What's a quetzal?

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Well just look here to my dear companion, Primio, and you'll have your answer. Varlamore is a large and diverse kingdom, but thanks to our quetzals, navigating it is as straightforward as can be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds exciting!

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: You're not wrong there. Nothing beats taking to the skies.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Look's like you won’t be taking to the skies just yet though...

sections.title: Talking after arriving to Varlamore for the first time

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Well, here we are! Welcome to Fortis!

sections.title: Talking after being told about the Tullus twins

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Nilsal, adventurer. Do you wish to return to Varrock?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Then we will depart at once.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Regulus Cento
lines.text: Very well.
